name: obsidian-crate
description: Crate plugin - Sync your vault to Cloudflare R2

scripts.dev: npm run build:worker && vite build --watch --mode development
scripts.build: npm run build:worker && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && vite build
scripts.deploy: if [ -z "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT" ]; then echo 'Error: OBSIDIAN_VAULT env var is not set. Export it to your vault path.'; exit 1; fi && npm run build && mkdir -p "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-crate" && cp dist/main.js manifest.json dist/styles.css "$OBSIDIAN_VAULT/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-crate/"
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
